query: DELETE ua FROM userAssets ua INNER JOIN (SELECT ticker, userId, MAX(id) as maxId FROM userAssets GROUP BY ticker, userId HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) dups ON ua.ticker = dups.ticker AND ua.userId = dups.userId AND ua.id < dups.maxId;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2fRMU9WuDe4UzGh.6d94b4c6929d --database MmWmJbH77mYYXTZazVYpbM --execute DELETE ua FROM userAssets ua INNER JOIN (SELECT ticker, userId, MAX(id) as maxId FROM userAssets GROUP BY ticker, userId HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) dups ON ua.ticker = dups.ticker AND ua.userId = dups.userId AND ua.id < dups.maxId;
